title: Yamaguchi-gumi San-daime
overview: A boy born in a poor village in Tokushima spends his days idly until a chance meeting sets him on the road to becoming boss of Japan's largest gang. This epic film is the first part of greatest true-life series based on autobiography of the Yamaguchi-gumi's third leader, Taoka Kazuo.

trailers.title: 「山口組三代目」(公開年月日 1973年08月11日)　予告篇
